description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This canvas belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length: Freesize Made of canvas for durability and style Contrast stitch detailing for added attraction Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand name embossed on the loop Brand logo embossed on the tail CareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dusts
